candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows max conviction (100%) but green_matches=0 against historical memory, treat the signal as UNCONFIRMED and apply a sizing penalty — current-state extremity without historical analog is regime novelty, not edge.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0: size *= 0.5  # unconfirmed extremity; require hist_hr >= 0.60 for full size
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
